text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Osaka Hai, the spring Tenno Sho, and the
Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By achieving victory in all three of these races,
Tokai Teio has earned herself the title of...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Senior Spring Triple Crown champion! I'm so
freaking amazing!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe! ♪ Praise me more!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I achieved something even Prez never did!
choice_data_list: We need to throw you a party.
We need to throw you a party.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! You better go all out for me! ♪ Then,
let's hurry up and...
Teiooo!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on getting the Senior Spring
Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whoa, Kita! You came!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Of course! My role model carved her name into
history AGAIN!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I can't believe you won them all! That is really! So! Cool!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks! ♪ Since you're here, you should
join us for our big party!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh? A party?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...In a diner?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! My trainer is gonna treat me as a reward
for my accomplishments!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ah! You're thinking this is a little shabby for such
a legendary accomplishment, huh?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wh-what? No, no! I wouldn't say it's shabby, exactly...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I just thought you'd want something a little more
glamorous.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, you're so honest. Well yeah, it does seem
a bit down-to-earth.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But you know, I was the one who said a diner
would be fine.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why is that?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Because my victory was inevitable.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The Senior Spring Triple Crown isn't a title any
normal racer can achieve. It's reserved for the
best of the best.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So why would you expect anyone else to win it
but the unstoppable, ultra-cool Tokai Teio?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So there's no point going overboard on
celebrations now! That can wait until everything's
over!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm planning on getting even stronger. I can't
afford to stay satisfied, Kita!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Y-you're so cool!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I want to do amazing things like you one day!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, give it your best shot! Anyways, less
chatting and more partying!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ah, are you sure? I have quite the appetite, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's fine, it's fine! I was gonna order the fanciest
thing on the menu anyway!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well, if you insist... Then I'll start off with the
extra large rib-eye steak, along with an extra
large soda, and―

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio has become a Senior Spring Triple
Crown champion! I'm excited to see what she'll
achieve next!
